title: The fishing pack
description: have you ever wanted to fish in minecraft but couldnt find a  good modpack for your needs well thats what i did so i made this i hope you enjoy
body:
Have you ever wanted to fish in Minecraft? Well, I have—so I made this awesome modpack! It features 


:custom structures to explore
:over 80 new fish to catch 
:delicious new food items
:decorative blocks to build with
:and exciting world generation 

to keep things fresh. I spent about 17 hours fixing bugs and polishing it, so I really hope you enjoy it. if you have any requests or bugs il be on the sever Happy fishing!
